title: Russell Reagan
text: Home * People * Russell Reagan Russell Reagan , an American software developer, chess programmer and author of apparently private chess engines [1] , early Bitboard promoter [2] , and until 2015 active poster in Computer Chess Forums . In 2004, Russell served as moderator in CCC [3] . Contents 1 Forum Posts 1.1 2000 ... 1.2 2005 ... 1.3 2010 ... 1.4 2015 ... 2 External Links 3 References Forum Posts [ edit ] 2000 ...
